title: THE LAST OF US I & II : Main menu - panorama
description: Change the Minecraft panorama to the main menu backgrounds of The Last of Us.
body:
Changes the Minecraft main menu panorama to the main menu backgrounds from both The Last of Us I and II.

Includes:

* The Last of Us I window background.

* The beach (without the full game) from The Last of Us II.

* The beach (with the full game) from The Last of Us II.

Each background is downloadable in the versions of this resource pack, so don't update this resource in your modpack, as it may not go to the version you don't want; all are from version 1.20.1.

Here you can compare the original versions with my recreations

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e97b22aa199767ed4c713865462eb0912bcb2a72.jpeg)

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05ca5290514c8e0a959f08345abb614c6c44df02_0.webp)
